Home / Legal
Legal

Know your rights.

Custody, child support, and finding help you can afford — the legal side of single fatherhood, explained without the jargon.

The legal stuff is where a lot of single dads feel most outmatched. These guides break down the pieces that come up most — written to be read by a tired parent at 11pm, not a law student.

Start with your state. Custody, child support, and legal aid are run at the state level — jump straight to your state's official resources.

Or browse all states

  • Alaska
  • Arizona
  • Arkansas

  • Wisconsin

The basics, in plain English

Custody & Visitation

What custody really means, the arrangements courts favor, and how to give yourself the best shot.

How support is calculated, how to change it when life changes, and what to do whether you pay or receive.
